Task.Name: Phase 1 - Initialization
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + JCI IT + KPMG

Task.Name: 1.1 Project Setup and Governance
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT PM + JCI IT PM

Task.Name: Appoint IT Project Leads (Bosch and JCI)
Set Up PMO Tools and SharePoint Collaboration Site
1.2 Initial IT Landscape Assessment
Task.Notes: Resources: JCI IT + Bosch IT | 180 sites across AP/AM/EMEA; AP and AM are the largest regions

Task.Name: High-Level IT Inventory Request to JCI
Location List - 180 Sites (AP / AM / EMEA)
Task.Notes: Resources: JCI IT + Facilities | AP and AM sites prioritised; collect full addresses and site types

Task.Name: Identify Key IT Dependencies and JCI Shared Services
Define Initial Scope Boundaries
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG + JCI IT | ~8000 employees; ~6000 IT client devices; FRAME-comparable IT/ERP landscape

Task.Name: TSA Framework Preliminary Definition (18-Month TSA)
Task.Notes: Resources: Legal + IT PM | JCI operates all IT for Bosch during 18-month TSA period

Task.Name: QG1 - Initialization Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | All deliverables signed off; project charter approved; proceed to Concept

Task.Name: Application Landscape Inventory (LeanIX / CMDB) ~500 Apps
Task.Notes: Resources: JCI IT Architects + KPMG | Comparable to FRAME; use LeanIX as master landscape tool

Task.Name: IT Infrastructure As-Is Mapping (180 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: JCI Infra Team | Site visits for top 20 locations; AP and AM hubs prioritised

Task.Name: ERP Landscape Analysis (SAP and Non-SAP)
Task.Notes: Resources: JCI ERP Team + KPMG | FRAME-comparable SAP landscape

Task.Name: Data Ownership and Separation Rules
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG + Legal | Non-selective migration approach preferred (ref. FRAME)

Task.Name: Contract and License Inventory
Task.Notes: Resources: JCI Procurement + IT | Change of control clauses; ~6000 device licenses

Task.Name: HR IT Systems Mapping (8000 Employees)
Task.Notes: Resources: JCI HR IT | Country-by-country HR rules required

Task.Name: Country-Specific IT Requirements (Brazil China India Mexico)
Task.Notes: Resources: Regional IT Leads | Brazil ERP tax complexity; China local FTS; India RBIN

Task.Name: Merger Zone Concept and Design Workshop
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch + JCI Architects | Temporary environment to receive all JCI IT services and applications

Task.Name: WAN and LAN Architecture Design (180 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra + KPMG | Regional hub model: AP hub + AM hub + EMEA hub

Task.Name: M365 and Azure Tenant Design
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Azure Team | 6000+ mailboxes and OneDrive migration scope

Task.Name: Co-Locator and Data Center Selection (per Region)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Procurement + IT | Recommend 3 regional co-locators: AP / AM / EMEA

Task.Name: Carve-Out Model Selection (Stand Alone)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch + JCI Management | JCI full carve-out; Merger Zone as interim state before Bosch integration

Task.Name: ERP Migration Strategy (Relocation vs Split vs Greenfield)
Application Categorization and Wave Planning (~500 Apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG + WS Leads | Sort: keep/replace/no-action; assign to migration waves

Task.Name: TSA Service Catalog Definition (18-Month JCI Services)
Task.Notes: Resources: JCI IT + Bosch IT | Catalog all JCI services; define exit criteria per service

Task.Name: Merger Zone to Bosch Migration Strategy
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Architects | Post-TSA migration roadmap

Task.Name: Client Device Inventory (~6000 Devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: JCI IT + Asset Mgmt | Identify device age; out-of-support hardware replacement plan

Task.Name: Client Migration Approach (Reimaging vs In-Place)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CWP Team | ~6000 clients across 180 sites; wave-based by region

Task.Name: QG2 - Concept Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Architecture approved; migration strategy confirmed; TSA catalog accepted; proceed to Development

Task.Name: WAN Provider Selection and Ordering (180 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Procurement | Order immediately after QG2 - 4-6 month lead time for all sites

Task.Name: Co-Locator Data Center Procurement (3 Regions)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra | AP + AM + EMEA co-locators

Task.Name: Active Directory Build (Merger Zone)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch AD Team | Foundation for 6000+ client and application migrations

Task.Name: WAN Implementation - AP Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: WAN Provider + Bosch Infra | Largest region; stagger by country

Task.Name: WAN Implementation - AM Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: WAN Provider + Bosch Infra | Largest region; US hubs first

Task.Name: LAN and WiFi Setup (Top 30 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra | Remaining 150 sites use existing JCI LAN under TSA

Task.Name: Server Infrastructure Build (Merger Zone - 3 Regional DCs)
Telephony Setup Merger Zone (180 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Telecom | Phone number porting 4-8 weeks per site per operator

Task.Name: File Share Infrastructure (NAS / Cloud)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra | User documents for ~8000 employees

Task.Name: SAP Interface Identification and Adaptation Plan
SAP Authorization Concept (Disconnect from JCI IdM)
ERP Test Environment Setup (SIT and UAT)
Application Inventory Finalization
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG + JCI IT | Validate LeanIX entries; add local/regional apps

Task.Name: Application Grouping into Migration Waves
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG + WS Leads | Wave 1: critical; Wave 2: standard; Wave 3: remaining

Task.Name: Custom Application Adaptation for Merger Zone
Device Reimaging Standard and Packaging (~6000 Devices)
Regional Wave Plan - Client Migration (AP AM EMEA)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CWP + IT PM | AP Wave A+B; AM Wave A+B; EMEA Wave A

Task.Name: User Profile and OneDrive Migration Tooling Setup
IT Security Concept Finalization (incl. External Assessment)
Bosch IT Org Structure (8000 Employees / 180 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch HR + IT | Regional IT leads for AP / AM / EMEA

Task.Name: MSP and ITO Contracting (Field Support 180 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Procurement | On-site support for AP and AM sites

Task.Name: Help Desk Setup and Staffing (Multi-Region 24x5)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Ops | Multilingual support for AP / AM / EMEA time zones

Task.Name: TSA Governance Model (Monthly Reviews and Reporting)
TSA Contracts Legal Review and Finalization
QG3 - Development Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Merger Zone ready; ERP built; app packages ready; 6000 devices packaged; TSA contracts signed

Task.Name: 4.1 Infrastructure Migration to Merger Zone (180 Sites)
WAN Cutover - AP Sites Batch 1 (Major Hubs)
Task.Notes: Resources: WAN Team + JCI Infra | AP largest region; hub-first approach

Task.Name: WAN Cutover - AM Sites Batch 1 (Major Hubs)
File Share Migration to Merger Zone (~8000 Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra | User documents and shared drives

Task.Name: Telephony Cutover to Merger Zone (180 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Telecom | Staggered by site; 4-8 weeks per operator

Task.Name: Client Migration Wave 1 - AP Region Hub Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: AP IT Team | ~900 devices (AP hubs)

Task.Name: Client Migration Wave 2 - AM Region Hub Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: AM IT Team | ~900 devices (AM hubs)

Task.Name: Client Migration Wave 4 - AP Region Remaining Sites
Client Migration Wave 5 - AM Region Remaining Sites
Client Migration Wave 6 - Stragglers and Exceptions
Task.Notes: Resources: CWP Team | ~500 devices; special handling

Task.Name: Email and M365 Mailbox Migration (6000+ Mailboxes)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Azure Team | Migrate in batches aligned with client waves

Task.Name: SAP Shell Copy Execution - Test Run
SAP Shell Copy Execution - Production Prep
Wave 1 Application Migration - Critical Business Apps
Wave 3 Application Migration - Remaining and Local Apps
Task.Notes: Resources: App Teams | Regional apps (AP / AM / EMEA) included

Task.Name: Change of Control Notifications to Vendors
Frozen Zone Begins (Minimize Production Changes)
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM | No production changes without SteerCo approval from this point

Task.Name: End-User Communication Plan (8000 Users / 180 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: Comms + Regional IT | Multi-language; AP + AM + EMEA

Task.Name: Help Desk 24x7 Activation and Training
Task.Notes: Resources: IT Ops | Multi-region time zone coverage

Task.Name: QG4 - Implementation Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | 6000 clients migrated; ERP live in MZ; apps live in MZ; UAT passed; cutover plan approved

Task.Name: Day 1 - Closing (Legal Transfer of JCI Business to Bosch)
Network Domain Cutover to Merger Zone
TSA Services Activation - JCI Begins Operating IT for Bosch
Task.Notes: Resources: JCI IT + Bosch IT | 18-month TSA clock starts 01 Jul 2028; expires 31 Dec 2029

Task.Name: User Announcement and Go-Live Communication (8000 Users)
5.2 Hypercare - 90 Calendar Days
Task.Notes: Resources: All WS Leads + IT Ops

Task.Name: Daily Operations Review Meetings (Regional Standups)
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + Regional WS Leads | AP + AM + EMEA standup cadence

Task.Name: Incident Management and P1/P2 Issue Resolution
Performance Monitoring and TSA SLA Tracking
Task.Notes: Resources: IT Ops | JCI SLA compliance tracked from Day 1

Task.Name: QG5 - GoLive Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Hypercare complete; P1/P2 resolved; SLA baseline established; stabilization can begin

Task.Name: Phase 6 - Stabilization and TSA Exit
Task.Notes: Resources: All Workstreams + JCI | JCI TSA expires 31 Dec 2029 (18 months from Day 1 on 01 Jul 2028)

Task.Name: 6.1 Stabilization and Knowledge Transfer
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + JCI TSA Team

Task.Name: TSA Governance - Monthly Service Reviews (JCI)
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + JCI IT | Monthly reviews; track against SLA and service exit criteria

Task.Name: Knowledge Transfer - JCI to Bosch (Runbooks Processes Docs)
Task.Notes: Resources: JCI IT + Bosch IT | All 180 sites; AP and AM priority

Task.Name: Bosch IT Environment Preparation for Integration
6.2 Migration - Merger Zone to Bosch Environment
Bosch AD Integration and Identity Federation
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IAM | Merge Merger Zone AD into Bosch AD

Task.Name: Client Re-Migration to Bosch Domain (6000 Devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CWP | Wave-based by region; AP + AM largest effort

Task.Name: Application Migration Wave 1 - Merger Zone to Bosch
Application Migration Wave 2 - Merger Zone to Bosch
Application Migration Wave 3 - Merger Zone to Bosch
M365 Tenant Migration to Bosch M365 (6000 Mailboxes)
Network Integration to Bosch Backbone (180 Sites)
TSA Exit Planning per Service (All JCI Services)
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + JCI | Define exit criteria and acceptance tests per service

Task.Name: TSA Service Exit Wave 1 - Infrastructure Services
TSA Service Exit Wave 2 - Application Services
TSA Service Exit Wave 3 - Final Remaining Services
TSA Exit Confirmation (All JCI Services Terminated)
QG6 - Stabilization Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | TSA fully exited; all 180 sites on Bosch environment; project formally closed
